description: Vertical graphic card from the Department of Labor combining a photo background, a headline, and a quoted news excerpt. The upper portion is a color photo of a welder at work: a person in a green-teal flame-resistant jacket, blue welding gloves, and a blue welding helmet with purple-tinted lens, kneeling and welding amid sparks and smoke at a construction site with timber and rebar in the background. Across the lower-middle is a white serif headline 'Skilled Trades BOOM!' ('Skilled Trades' italic, 'BOOM!' bold). Below is a white rounded text box with the yellow 'Deseret News' logo and black serif article text: 'A May report by Resume Builder found that 42 percent of Gen Z adults, those born between 1997 and 2012, are now pursuing blue-collar jobs. For Jimenez, there's the timeless appeal of work that's always in demand, that has fewer barriers to entry, that increases his odds of becoming a business owner.' A small DOL seal is centered at the bottom.
notable_text: Skilled Trades BOOM!; Deseret News; A May report by Resume Builder found that 42 percent of Gen Z adults... are now pursuing blue-collar jobs.
